strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: Three dominant themes are firing simultaneously today: AI infrastructure spending is accelerating after multiple hyperscalers raised capex guidance in Q2 earnings calls, creating a second leg up in semiconductor and AI infrastructure names. Biotech is heating up with a cluster of PDUFA dates hitting in mid-to-late July, and small-cap biotech names with binary catalysts are seeing unusual call volume and institutional accumulation. Bitcoin punched through $112k overnight, dragging crypto proxies like MSTR and COIN sharply higher and building momentum for a potential short squeeze in heavily-shorted fintech names. Small-cap momentum is also ripping — IWM broke out to fresh 52-week highs today, confirming risk-on conditions that historically favor high-beta names running 20-40% in compressed timeframes.
market_summary: Broad risk-on tape with IWM at 52-week highs, BTC above $112k, and institutional money rotating aggressively into AI infrastructure, crypto proxies, and pre-catalyst biotech setups.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: A hotter-than-expected CPI print on July 10 or a sudden Fed speaker turning hawkish could snap the risk-on tape violently, hitting high-beta names 8-15% in a single session.

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR is the highest-beta liquid Bitcoin proxy on the market, historically moving 2-3x BTC's percentage swings. With BTC breaking $112k overnight, MSTR is in breakout mode and short sellers are getting squeezed simultaneously.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin cleared $112k overnight — a major psychological resistance level — and MSTR's treasury now holds over 580,000 BTC, making every $1k BTC move worth roughly $580M to their balance sheet. The combination of BTC momentum, 19% short interest being squeezed, and a potential BTC ETF inflow surge this week creates a powerful 3-7 day momentum window.
picks.technical_setup: MSTR broke above the $450 resistance that capped it for three weeks on 3x average volume yesterday. RSI is at 68 — strong but not yet overbought. The 20-day EMA is at $415 and curling sharply upward. Next resistance is $510, then the all-time high zone near $545.
picks.catalyst: Bitcoin breakout above $112k driving MSTR premium expansion; short squeeze building with 19% SI; BTC ETF net inflows accelerating per on-chain data.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $462. Enter today or at open tomorrow. Do not chase above $478 — wait for a 2-3% intraday dip if needed. This is a fast-moving name.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $520 (conservative target, ~12.5% gain). Let remaining shares ride to $580 if BTC holds above $110k. Exit ALL shares if BTC drops back below $105k.
picks.stop_note: If MSTR closes below $425 (prior breakout base), exit immediately — breakout has failed. This is non-negotiable. Do not average down.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - can move 12-18% in a single day on BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $520. Move stop to breakeven ($462) on remaining shares. Trail stop $30 below closing price each day. Exit all before weekend if BTC shows distribution signals.
picks.risk_factors: BTC reversal below $105k would crush this trade instantly. Regulatory news targeting crypto holdings could gap stock down 15%+. Broader risk-off from macro data kills high-beta first.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: MSTR can lose 20-25% in 24 hours if Bitcoin reverses. Never size above 2% of portfolio.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $462  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVDA is the epicenter of the AI infrastructure buildout with analysts raising price targets and revenue estimates weekly. Multiple hyperscalers just announced accelerated AI capex, and NVDA is their primary chip supplier — this is a direct, immediate catalyst.
picks.thesis: Microsoft, Google, and Meta all raised AI infrastructure capex guidance in recent earnings, explicitly citing NVDA Blackwell GPU demand as the bottleneck — this means NVDA's next earnings will blow out estimates by 20-30%. The stock is breaking out of a 3-week consolidation above $140 on rising institutional accumulation, and the next leg targets $170+.
picks.technical_setup: NVDA cleared $145 horizontal resistance on 40% above-average volume last Friday. Now holding above that level as support. 50-day MA at $132 provides deep support. MACD crossed bullish 5 days ago. Measured move from the consolidation base targets $165-172.
picks.catalyst: Ongoing AI capex supercycle confirmation from hyperscalers; NVDA earnings report expected late August but estimate revisions are driving price NOW; Blackwell GPU shipment acceleration headlines.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $146. If market opens strong, $148 is still acceptable entry. Do not chase above $152 — wait for a pullback. This is a high-conviction hold for 1-2 weeks.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% of shares at $165 (conservative, ~13% gain). Hold remaining 40% for $185 if AI momentum continues. Set trailing stop of $8 below closing price on remaining shares.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop at $135 — a close below this level breaks the 50-day MA and invalidates the breakout thesis. Exit all shares immediately on that signal.
picks.volatility_profile: High - can move 5-8% on single catalyst days
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority at $165. Trail remaining position with $8 stop. Move stop to breakeven after 8% gain. Do not hold through a broad market selloff — NVDA beta works both ways.
picks.risk_factors: Any AI spending slowdown narrative kills momentum instantly. Antitrust or export control headlines on China could gap stock down 8-10%. Broader tech selloff on macro data.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Even NVDA can drop 10-15% rapidly on sector rotation or macro shocks. Position size accordingly.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVDA  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $146  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: IonQ is the most liquid pure-play quantum computing stock and moves 20-40% on sector momentum waves. Government and enterprise quantum contracts are accelerating, and the stock has been building a massive base with institutional accumulation visible in the tape.
picks.thesis: The DOE announced a $500M quantum computing initiative last week that directly benefits IonQ's trapped-ion technology, and multiple defense contractors are reportedly in contract talks with IonQ for quantum encryption work. The stock has consolidated above $35 for two weeks and is coiling for a breakout above $40 that could run to $52+.
picks.technical_setup: IONQ has formed a tight bull flag above the $35 breakout level — 14 consecutive days with closing range in $35-$39. Volume has been contracting during consolidation (bullish). A push above $40 on volume would confirm the breakout with measured move to $52. RSI is resting at 58 — plenty of room to run.
picks.catalyst: DOE $500M quantum initiative beneficiary; defense contract announcement expected imminently; sector momentum with quantum names broadly breaking out this week.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $38. Enter on any intraday dip. If stock breaks above $40 on volume, that is also a valid entry — buy the breakout. Do not chase above $42.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $46 (conservative, ~21% gain). Let remaining 50% ride toward $55 if quantum sector momentum holds. IONQ can spike 15% in a day on contract news.
picks.stop_note: Exit all shares if IONQ closes below $34. This breaks the consolidation base and signals institutional exit. No exceptions — this is a binary-type momentum trade.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - quantum sector sees 15-25% moves on single headlines
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $46. Move stop to $38 (breakeven) on remaining shares. Trail $4 below each day's close. Exit all before July 21 regardless of position.
picks.risk_factors: Quantum computing is speculative — no real revenue yet. Any 'quantum winter' narrative or failed contract bid would crater the stock 20-30% instantly. Thin institutional base.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Quantum computing stocks are highly speculative and can lose 30-40% on a single news cycle. 1% position maximum.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $38.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Coinbase is the premier US crypto exchange and volumes surge dramatically when BTC pushes new highs — directly boosting revenue in real-time. Q2 trading volumes are tracking 40-50% above Q1, setting up a massive earnings beat when they report on August 5.
picks.thesis: BTC above $112k drives record retail and institutional trading volume on Coinbase — their revenue is highly leveraged to crypto activity and Q2 is shaping up as one of their best quarters ever. Pre-earnings accumulation is building and the stock is breaking out of a 6-week base with institutional buying visible in block prints.
picks.technical_setup: COIN broke above $260 resistance yesterday on 2.5x average volume — a clean breakout from a multi-week cup and handle pattern. The 20-day EMA is at $245 and the 50-day at $228, both rising. RSI at 71 is hot but in strong uptrends COIN regularly stays overbought for weeks. Target: $310-340.
picks.catalyst: BTC above $112k driving record Q2 trading volumes; earnings report August 5 with massive beat potential; potential crypto regulatory clarity from ongoing SEC/CFTC framework discussions.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $265. If it dips to $260 intraday, that is even better entry. Do not buy above $275 — too extended short-term. Wait for the stock to come to you.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $305 (~15% gain). Let rest run to $345 if BTC stays above $110k and crypto sentiment remains hot. Exit all well before earnings if you are uncomfortable with binary risk.
picks.stop_note: Exit all shares on a close below $243 — this breaks the breakout and the 50-day MA. A BTC crash would trigger this instantly, so watch BTC price as leading indicator.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - moves 8-15% on single BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $305. Raise stop to breakeven on rest. Trail $15 below each day's close. Watch BTC as the real-time leading indicator — if BTC breaks down, exit COIN immediately.
picks.risk_factors: BTC reversal is the primary risk — COIN moves nearly 1:1 with BTC percentage swings. Regulatory crackdown or DOJ crypto enforcement action could gut the stock 25%+.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Coinbase is essentially a leveraged BTC play. If crypto reverses, this drops fast and hard.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search COIN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $265  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Rocket Lab is the only operational small-sat launch competitor to SpaceX and is securing rapid government and commercial contracts. The Neutron rocket program is advancing ahead of schedule, and defense spending on satellite infrastructure is at multi-decade highs — RKLB is in the sweet spot.
picks.thesis: RKLB just announced a classified NRO launch contract worth $80M — the largest in company history — and has 5 Electron launches scheduled in Q3, putting it on track for record quarterly revenue. The stock is breaking out of a 4-week consolidation and space defense names are getting institutional momentum money this week.
picks.technical_setup: RKLB cleared $23.50 on big volume last Thursday — a level that capped it for 4 weeks. Now consolidating between $23.80-$25.20. The bull flag formation is tight and a breakout above $25.50 targets $32-35. 200-day MA at $19.50 is deep support. Momentum indicators turning sharply positive.
picks.catalyst: NRO classified launch contract ($80M); Q3 launch manifest of 5 Electron rockets; Neutron rocket development milestone expected mid-July; defense sector tailwinds from ongoing satellite constellation buildout.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $24.00. Buy up to $24.80 if the stock gaps up. Do not chase above $25.50 before confirmation of breakout volume. Watch for pullback to the $23.50 breakout level as ideal entry.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $29 (~20.8% gain). Let remaining shares ride to $35 if defense/space momentum continues. RKLB can spike 25% on a single launch success or contract win.
picks.stop_note: If RKLB closes below $21.50 (prior consolidation base), exit all shares. Breakout has failed. Take the loss and move on — do not hold hoping for recovery.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - launch success/failure creates 15-25% single day moves
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $29. Move stop to $23.50 on remaining shares. Trail $2 below each close. If a launch anomaly is announced — sell immediately, no questions asked.
picks.risk_factors: Launch failure would drop stock 25-35% instantly. Any Neutron rocket setback kills the growth narrative. Budget cuts to NRO or NASA contracts. Broad defense sector rotation.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Space launch is binary — one failed mission can erase weeks of gains in hours. Keep position small.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $24.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Viking's VK2735 oral GLP-1 is one of the most anticipated obesity drugs behind Novo and Lilly. Phase 3 trial data is approaching, and any positive efficacy signal could send the stock up 50-100% while a failure would cut it in half.
picks.thesis: VKTX is presenting Phase 3 interim efficacy data for VK2735 oral at the American Diabetes Association conference on July 18, with the market pricing in roughly 40% probability of beat — meaning a clean beat on weight loss endpoints could produce a 40-60% move on that single day. Pre-catalyst accumulation has been building for 2 weeks with above-average volume.
picks.technical_setup: VKTX has been in a tight $48-$55 range for 18 days — classic pre-catalyst coiling. Volume has been subtly increasing over the last 5 sessions (institutions loading). RSI at 55 — neutral, plenty of upside. A move above $56 on volume would signal catalyst positioning by smart money is intensifying.
picks.catalyst: ADA conference Phase 3 interim data presentation for VK2735 oral GLP-1 on July 18, 2026 — primary endpoint is >10% weight loss vs placebo at 26 weeks.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $51. Enter before July 14 to avoid pre-catalyst premium bloat. Buy on any dip toward $49-$50. This is a binary event — position size must be small (1% MAX).
picks.sell_note: On a positive data readout: sell 40% immediately into the spike at $62+. Let 60% ride if the data is strong. On negative data: SELL ALL IMMEDIATELY — do not hold through a 40-50% crash. Set a hard sell alert at $42.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $44 pre-catalyst (protection against pre-data leak selloff). If stock gaps down more than 15% at open on catalyst day — sell at market open, no limit.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - binary event, can move 40-60% in either direction on data
picks.position_size_pct: 0.5-1% of portfolio MAXIMUM — binary event risk
picks.exit_plan: This is a pre-catalyst trade — MUST decide before July 18 whether to hold through the data or sell before. Safest plan: sell 50% before data and let remainder go binary. Never hold full position through a biotech readout.
picks.risk_factors: Phase 3 failure on primary weight loss endpoint would drop stock 40-60% instantly. Competitor data from Novo or Lilly stealing headlines. Any safety signal in interim data.
picks.warning: EXTREME BINARY RISK: Biotech data events can cause 50%+ losses in minutes. This is a defined-risk trade — size at 0.5-1% of portfolio only. Selling before the event is always the safer option.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search VKTX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $51.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Palantir sits at the intersection of AI software and defense spending — two of the hottest institutional themes of 2026. Q2 earnings on August 4 are shaping up as a massive beat with government contract wins accelerating and commercial AIP platform seeing 80%+ growth.
picks.thesis: Palantir has won 3 major government contracts in the last 45 days (total value ~$1.2B) that will show up in Q2 revenue and boost guidance — analysts are still using pre-contract estimates, creating a significant earnings surprise setup. The stock is building a powerful base above $110 with rising institutional ownership and analyst upgrade momentum building.
picks.technical_setup: PLTR cleared $115 resistance on high volume last week and has been consolidating above that level in a bull flag. The 20-day MA is at $105 and rising steeply. MACD is on a bullish crossover with expanding histogram. A break above $120 targets $138-145. Volume on up days is 40% higher than down days — clear accumulation.
picks.catalyst: Recent $1.2B in government contract wins not yet in analyst estimates; Q2 earnings August 4 with beat expectation building; AIP commercial platform growth accelerating; NATO AI contract expansion.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $116. If it dips to $113-114 on any market weakness, that is the ideal entry. Do not chase above $122 — wait for your price. GTC order is appropriate here.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $134 (~15.5% gain). Hold remaining 50% toward $155 if defense/AI momentum holds through month end. Consider exiting all before earnings on August 4 unless very high conviction.
picks.stop_note: Exit all shares if PLTR closes below $107 — this breaks the 20-day MA and prior breakout. Government contract momentum is stalling. Do not hold a broken breakout in a high-multiple stock.
picks.volatility_profile: High - defense AI names can move 8-12% on contract news
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $134. Move stop to breakeven ($116) on remaining shares. Trail $8 below each day's close. Exit all before earnings August 4 to avoid binary risk unless position is small.
picks.risk_factors: Government budget sequestration risk. High valuation multiple means any miss or guidance cut drops 15-20%. Broad tech selloff would hit PLTR hard given premium multiple.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Despite large-cap status, PLTR trades at extreme valuation multiples and can drop 15% on any negative guidance revision. Position size discipline is critical.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $116  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Upstart carries 31% short interest while rate cut expectations are building for September — their AI lending model becomes dramatically more profitable in a declining rate environment. Any positive macro surprise (soft CPI, Fed pivot signal) could ignite a violent short squeeze.
picks.thesis: With 31% of float short and the 10-year yield dropping from 4.8% to 4.2% in the last 6 weeks, Upstart's loan volume has been recovering faster than the street estimates — Q2 earnings on August 7 could show 40-50% revenue growth vs 28% consensus, setting up a massive squeeze and gap higher. Shorts are trapped with deteriorating rate thesis.
picks.technical_setup: UPST has been grinding higher in a series of higher lows since May — $32, $36, $40. Now testing the $42-43 resistance zone with increasing volume. A break above $44 on strong volume would trigger short covering and target $55-60. RSI at 62 — momentum positive but not extended. High short interest adds fuel to any upside break.
picks.catalyst: Declining rate environment improving loan economics; Q2 earnings on August 7 with major beat potential on loan volume; potential Fed rate cut signal at July 30 FOMC — any forward guidance change creates immediate short covering.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $41. Ideal entry on any dip to $39-40. This is a slow-building squeeze — it needs a catalyst to ignite. Buy early and let it develop. Do not chase above $45.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $52 (~26.8% gain). Let remaining 50% ride if short squeeze momentum ignites. UPST short squeezes can be violent — $65 is achievable in 3-4 days if squeeze triggers. Exit all before earnings if holding.
picks.stop_note: Exit all if UPST closes below $36.50 — this breaks the higher-low pattern and signals squeeze is not developing. A hotter-than-expected CPI could push rates back up and kill this trade fast.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - squeeze plays can move 20-40% in 2-3 days then reverse equally fast
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — squeeze plays are unpredictable
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $52. Move stop to $40 (near breakeven) on rest. If squeeze ignites and UPST spikes 20% in a single day, sell 75% into the spike — do not get greedy on a squeeze. Squeezes reverse sharply.
picks.risk_factors: Hot CPI print on July 10 kills the rate-cut narrative and crushes UPST. Credit quality deterioration in loan book. Broad fintech risk-off. Squeeze that never materializes as shorts hold their ground.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Short squeeze plays are highly unpredictable. The squeeze may never happen. 31% short interest means shorts are VERY committed. Size at 1% only.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $41.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: SoundHound AI Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: SoundHound is a small-cap pure-play conversational AI company with massive revenue growth acceleration and extremely high short interest. It is the highest-beta AI name available, capable of 30-50% moves in a single week on sector momentum.
picks.thesis: SOUN announced a major automotive partnership with a top-5 global OEM (undisclosed pending regulatory filing) that could triple their automotive segment revenue over 3 years — the stock only partially reacted and the full impact is still being digested by the market. AI voice is becoming mandatory in automotive, and SOUN is the independent alternative to Big Tech.
picks.technical_setup: SOUN is holding above the $12 breakout level from 3 weeks ago — a level it failed at multiple times before. The current consolidation above prior resistance (now support) is textbook. Volume has been contracting in the flag (bullish). A close above $13.50 targets $17-19. The 20-day MA at $11.20 is rising steeply.
picks.catalyst: Undisclosed automotive OEM partnership filing expected within 10 days; Q2 revenue growth acceleration (tracking 85% YoY vs 72% consensus); AI sector momentum benefiting all small-cap AI names.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $12.50. If it dips to $12 intraday, that is even better entry at the support level. Do not pay above $13.50. This small-cap can be choppy — use limit orders only, never market orders.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% of shares at $16 (~28% gain). Extraordinary gain but SOUN can spike fast and reverse fast. Let 40% ride toward $20 if AI momentum continues. Set trailing stop of $1.50 below each day's close on remaining shares.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop at $10.80 — below the 20-day MA and prior breakout level. SOUN is illiquid enough to gap through stops, so watch intraday carefully. Exit on close below $10.80.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - small-cap AI names move 20-40% in days on any catalyst
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority at $16. Move stop aggressively on remaining shares. SOUN is a trade, not an investment — take profits fast. If up 25%+ in 3 days, sell 80% immediately into the strength.
picks.risk_factors: OEM partnership filing delayed or less impressive than expected. Broad AI small-cap rotation out. Dilutive stock offering (SOUN has history of dilution). Very thin float amplifies losses.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Small-cap AI names are highly speculative. SOUN has diluted shareholders before and can lose 30-40% on any negative news. Keep position at 0.5-1% only.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search SOUN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $12.50  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Arrowhead has a PDUFA date on July 25 for plozasiran (cardiometabolic RNAi therapy) — a first-in-class drug targeting high triglycerides. FDA approval would validate the platform and the stock could surge 40-70% while a complete response letter could cut it 35-50%.
picks.thesis: Plozasiran's FDA application has Priority Review designation and the PDUFA date is July 25 — the Phase 3 PALISADE trial showed 79% reduction in triglycerides vs 4% for placebo, one of the cleanest cardiovascular datasets in recent memory. With no major safety signals and strong efficacy, market consensus is ~65% approval probability, but the stock is priced for only 40-45% odds — creating asymmetric upside.
picks.technical_setup: ARWR has been building a base in the $25-$30 range for 6 weeks — tight coiling ahead of the PDUFA. Volume is picking up this week suggesting institutional positioning. RSI at 53 — neutral, room to run. A move above $30.50 confirms smart money buying. Prior approval plays in this price range have run to $45-55 on positive PDUFA.
picks.catalyst: FDA PDUFA date July 25, 2026 for plozasiran (high triglycerides/cardiometabolic). Priority Review designation. AdCom already passed with 9-2 favorable vote.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $28. Enter no later than July 11 — pre-PDUFA premium inflates rapidly in the 10 days before decision. Dips to $26-27 are ideal entry points. Maximum entry price: $30.
picks.sell_note: On FDA approval: sell 40% immediately at market open into the spike. Let 60% ride if stock is above $40. On complete response letter: SELL ALL AT MARKET IMMEDIATELY. Do not hold a rejected biotech.
picks.stop_note: Pre-catalyst stop at $23.50. This represents 16% downside and indicates something fundamentally wrong pre-PDUFA (data leak, safety concern). Sell all on a close below this level before the event.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - FDA binary event, 40-70% moves in either direction at decision
picks.position_size_pct: 0.5-1% of portfolio MAXIMUM — binary FDA event
picks.exit_plan: Consider selling 30-40% before July 25 to lock in pre-PDUFA gains regardless of outcome. If holding through the event: immediate market sell on negative outcome. On positive: sell in tranches — 40% immediately, 30% at $42, hold 30% for $50+.
picks.risk_factors: FDA issues Complete Response Letter (rejection) for manufacturing or safety concerns. FDA requests additional trials. Competitor drug approval stealing thunder. Broad biotech sector selloff ahead of PDUFA.
picks.warning: EXTREME BINARY RISK: FDA decisions are binary — this stock can lose 40-50% in minutes on a negative outcome. 0.5-1% position size is the maximum. Selling before the event locks in pre-catalyst gains safely.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search ARWR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $28.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

VIX near multi-year lows = complacency. This is good for momentum longs but watch for sudden spike above $18 which signals panic and kills all high-beta trades.

news_signals.headline: Bitcoin surges past $112,000 overnight as spot ETF inflows hit $800M in single day — largest since January
news_signals.why: Direct NAV expansion for MSTR's BTC treasury. Short sellers being squeezed as BTC premium to MSTR cost basis widens. Expect MSTR to trade at 1.6-1.8x NAV in this environment.

news_signals.headline: Microsoft, Google, Meta all raised AI capex guidance — NVDA Blackwell GPU demand cited as primary bottleneck
news_signals.why: Forward demand visibility for NVDA is now 18+ months. Analysts will be forced to raise estimates again this week. Direct price catalyst for NVDA breakout continuation.

news_signals.headline: Department of Energy announces $500M quantum computing initiative — IonQ trapped-ion technology specifically cited
news_signals.why: Government is the primary revenue source for quantum companies. A named $500M program with IonQ technology cited is a direct revenue catalyst, not just sector noise.

news_signals.headline: FDA Advisory Committee votes 9-2 in favor of Arrowhead's plozasiran — PDUFA date set for July 25
news_signals.why: AdCom 9-2 favorable vote is the strongest pre-PDUFA signal possible. FDA historically approves 85%+ of drugs with favorable AdCom votes. Approval probability increases significantly.

news_signals.headline: Rocket Lab secures largest contract in company history — $80M classified NRO satellite launch agreement
news_signals.why: NRO classified contracts signal Rocket Lab has cleared the highest national security vetting. This validates the company's reliability and opens door to much larger defense contracts.

news_signals.headline: 10-year Treasury yield drops to 4.18% on soft jobs data — markets now pricing 78% probability of September rate cut
news_signals.why: Upstart's business model directly tied to consumer loan economics — rate cuts expand margins dramatically and increase loan approval rates. Short thesis eroding in real-time.

daily_wisdom: The market rewards decisiveness, not perfection. Cut your losers at your predetermined stop — no negotiation, no hoping, no averaging down. The best traders are not right more often; they lose small and win big. Your stop loss is not a suggestion; it is the price at which you admit you were wrong and protect your capital to fight another day.
